title: Provider-backed progress server UI dogfood
description: Use the real YOLO runner/provider path to improve the progress server UI and prove the result through strict check, UI evidence, tests, and review gates.

requirements.text: The progress server UI must expose a clearer operator-facing UI/UX evidence area instead of relying only on hidden artifacts.
The UI must remain compact, responsive, escaped, and useful for active and idle runner states.
The work must be executed by the real YOLO runner/provider path and then validated by strict local gates and adapter evidence.

designs.text: Add a first-class UI evidence panel to the progress dashboard that summarizes page reachability, critical path, required state, layout health, runtime errors, responsive viewports, and visual artifacts.
Keep all dynamic task, gate, run, review, and evidence values escaped before insertion into HTML or client-side strings.
Validate through node --check, progress dashboard tests, progress UI evidence tests, yolo check, yolo accept, and yolo run adapter evidence.

state_matrix.idle: Dashboard shows lifecycle summary and UI evidence summary when there is no active run.
state_matrix.active: Dashboard shows progress, task cards, failed gate stats, review state, and UI evidence summary during a run.
state_matrix.error: Dashboard shows runtime/UI evidence failures as visible blockers rather than silent success.
state_matrix.mobile: Dashboard remains readable below 640px without horizontal overflow.
state_matrix.desktop: Dashboard keeps dense operator layout from 640px upward.

tasks.title: Add visible UI evidence panel to progress server
tasks.description: Improve src/runtime/progress/server.ts so the progress dashboard renders a visible, escaped UI evidence panel for active and idle states. Keep the change compact and do not weaken existing escaping or lifecycle behavior.

state_matrix.expectation: UI evidence panel visible without active run.
UI evidence panel visible with active run data.
Panel scans as part of operator dashboard.

acceptance_criteria: A visible progress dashboard UI evidence panel exists in server-rendered HTML.
The panel reports page, state, layout, runtime error, viewport, and visual artifact status.
The panel does not insert unescaped task, gate, or artifact strings into HTML.
Existing lifecycle summary, task cards, SSE refresh, and review state behavior continue to work.

post_conditions.message: Provider must modify the progress server UI implementation.
Progress server must render a stable uiEvidencePanel element.
Progress server must show UI Evidence as a visible operator-facing section.
Progress server must remain valid JavaScript.
Progress dashboard and UI evidence tests must pass.

tasks.title: Strengthen progress dashboard UI tests for evidence panel
tasks.description: Add deterministic tests that fail if the visible UI evidence panel disappears or stops escaping dangerous evidence/task strings.

state_matrix.expectation: Test verifies idle HTML contains UI evidence panel.
Test verifies active HTML/evidence contains UI evidence state.
Test verifies raw dangerous markup is escaped.

acceptance_criteria: Tests fail if uiEvidencePanel is missing.
Tests fail if dangerous UI evidence strings enter HTML unescaped.
Tests keep using deterministic local fixtures and do not require provider execution.

post_conditions.message: Progress dashboard tests must be strengthened.
Progress dashboard UI evidence tests must be strengthened.
Tests must assert the UI evidence panel exists.
Strengthened progress dashboard tests must pass.

tasks.title: Run strict UI evidence acceptance after provider changes
tasks.description: Collect adapter-backed UI evidence and ensure progress dashboard acceptance is blocked on missing state, layout blockers, runtime errors, or missing visual artifacts.

state_matrix.expectation: Adapter evidence collector produces UI evidence or blocks the run.

acceptance_criteria: yolo accept with collect/execute/allow adapter evidence passes after execution.
Missing UI evidence, runtime errors, overflow, overlap, or missing required states block acceptance.

post_conditions.message: Progress dashboard UI adapter manifest must exist.
YOLO check must pass with resolver-backed UI adapter readiness.
UI evidence collector must produce adapter-backed evidence; final yolo accept runs after the run report exists.
